calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-14-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TESLA, INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

Defendant Tesla, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration is granted. Tesla has shown that this case is covered by an arbitration agreement between the parties. That agreement is not unconscionable. The opt-out provision eliminates any procedural unconscionability or, at the least, shows that there is only a small amount of procedural unconscionability. Plaintiff has not identified any substantive unconscionability. Plaintiffs' request to arbitrate at JAMS is contrary to the arbitration agreement.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
